creator: gibbs@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please provide a detailed description of your SCSI subsystem including 
the firmware revision of your BusLogic adapter and the make and model 
of the drive timing out. 

You also mention that previous snap shot releases did not show this error. 
Did these releases contain CAM? 

When do the hangs occur?  During periods of heavy I/O activity?  At boot? 

There have been a few bug fixes to the BusLogic driver since 3.0R.  You 
may want to try a recent 3.0-SNAP to see if it addresses your problem. 

Lastly, ensure that your adapter is running the latest firmware revision 
available from the Mylex web site.
